ChooseWhenText: Choose it when City A needs a sharper shard spike before the next dispatch window tightens again.
WatchOutText: Mixed pressure and a rougher recovery line can leave the follow-up run less stable.
FollowUpHintText: Often solves the immediate stock problem, but the next dispatch has to respect the volatility bill it creates.
PartyFitText: Best with Outrider-style burst crews that can turn pressure rooms into a fast payoff.
CombatPlanText: Expect mixed slime-goblin pressure, a sharper mid-run spike, and a burst-focused elite finish.
EventFocus: Cache-first push into unstable shrine strain.
RewardPreview: Higher shards if the party survives the mixed front and Gel Core.
ExpectedNeedImpactText: Bigger shard spike, but the next dispatch window stays rougher.
